title: azalea alba
intro: Azalea alba, also known as white azalea, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Rhododendron genus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of azalea alba include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. Azalea alba can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
